hero.title: Run Your Salon Like a Pro
hero.subtitle: Coiffer is the complete offline management system for barbershops and hair salons. Appointments, payroll, inventory, loyalty — all in one beautiful dashboard.
hero.noCredit: No credit card. No internet. Runs on your Windows PC.

dashboard.title: Everything in One Place
dashboard.subtitle: See your entire business at a glance — revenue, appointments, clients, and staff, all in a clean, fast dashboard.
dashboard.caption: Coiffer Dashboard — Live preview

features.title: Every Tool Your Salon Needs
features.subtitle: Coiffer replaces paper schedules, manual payroll, and messy notebooks with one fast, beautiful system.

list.title: Command Center Dashboard
list.description: Live revenue tracking, top client leaderboard, today's appointments and completed transactions — the moment you open the app.

list.title: Lightning-Fast Point of Sale
list.description: Add services and products in seconds, apply smart loyalty discounts, and print professional receipts instantly.

list.title: Smart Appointment Booking
list.description: Visual barber schedule with conflict prevention. The system stops double-bookings automatically and marks no-shows at midnight.

list.title: Automated Employee Payroll
list.description: One-click attendance marking. The system calculates daily salary, tracks advances, and manages withdrawals with zero math errors.

list.title: Intelligent Inventory Control
list.description: Track every product — shampoos, blades, gels, towels. Visual low-stock alerts tell you exactly what to reorder.

list.title: Built-in Loyalty Program
list.description: Automatic points for every service. Complete client history — services, frequency, and lifetime spend — always at your fingertips.

list.title: Advanced Business Analytics
list.description: Best-seller services, automated net profit calculation after expenses and salaries, and one-click PDF financial reports.

list.title: Arabic, French & English
list.description: Switch the entire interface between three languages instantly. Full RTL layout when Arabic is selected. Dark and light mode included.

howItWorks.title: Up and Running in Minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: No technical knowledge required. No cloud setup. Just install and start managing your salon.

steps.title: Install on Your Windows PC
steps.description: Download and install Coiffer on your reception computer. No internet subscription, no monthly fee.

steps.title: Set Up Your Services & Staff
steps.description: Enter your barbers, services, and prices once. The system handles everything from there.

steps.title: Start Running Your Business
steps.description: Book appointments, process payments, track inventory, and watch your business grow — all from one dashboard.

pricing.title: Simple, One-Time Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No monthly subscriptions. No hidden fees. Pay once, own it forever.

plans.name: Single Shop License
plans.description: Everything you need to run one salon or barbershop, forever.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Salon Owners
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from barbershop owners across Algeria.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before buying.

items.q: Does Coiffer require an internet connection?
items.a: No. Coiffer runs 100% offline on your Windows PC. There are no cloud fees, no loading screens, and your data never leaves your shop.
Coiffer runs on Windows 10 and Windows 11. It is installed directly on your reception or office computer.

items.q: Can I try the software before buying?
items.a: Yes. Click the 'Try Free Demo' button to access a live web preview of the system. The full installed version is even faster.

items.q: How do I purchase a license?
items.a: Click 'Buy Now' and choose to contact us on Facebook Messenger or Instagram. Our team will handle payment and installation.

items.q: Is there Arabic and RTL support?
items.a: Yes. You can switch the entire interface to Arabic at any time. The layout automatically flips to right-to-left.

items.q: Can I use it for multiple shops?
items.a: Each license covers one installation. Contact us for multi-shop pricing.
We deliver the installer file and help you set it up. Installation typically takes under 15 minutes.

cta.title: Ready to Take Control of Your Salon?
cta.subtitle: Try the demo now — no signup, no credit card. See why salon owners across Algeria choose Coiffer.
cta.offlineNote: Runs 100% offline on your Windows PC
